claim.ref: Verify-first AC (shepherd-ruled, WS-33): FIRST action in execution is a live nav-walkthrough verify (Browse-books -> Back) under BOTH MODE_NAV_V2 on AND off. handleBack in apps/mobile/src/app/(app)/pick-book/[subjectId].tsx:123-133 already replaces to /(app)/shelf/[subjectId] on the normal flow (subjectId present), so the likely disposition is ALREADY-FIXED (predates this WI by commit 75ace69609, 2026-04-13). If the symptom does NOT reproduce: close the WI as already-fixed citing commit 75ace69609, AND add a regression test that locks the in-shell Back target so it cannot silently regress. If the symptom DOES reproduce: root-cause the actual repro path (it is not the handleBack fallback as currently written -- that only fires when subjectId is falsy, an edge case already guarded separately at lines 307-329) and fix + cover with a regression test. Root cause is provisional (candidate found, predates WI) until the live verify runs; the verify-first step is the DoR-satisfying framing for this Assisted item. Regression guard (red-green-revert): apps/mobile/src/app/(app)/pick-book/[subjectId].test.tsx:417-429 asserts Back from pick-book (subjectId present) replaces to /(app)/shelf/[subjectId], not /(app)/library — RED if handleBack falls back to library, GREEN with the in-shell target; guard pre-exists (landed with the fix in commit 75ace69609) and is verified passing.
